## HOW TO USE THIS FILE

This file contains the full knowledge graph in pipe-delimited text format.
Sections are separated by '===' headers. Each section has a header row
followed by data rows. Parse by splitting on '===' then reading lines.

For SQL: see graph.sql in the same directory (SQLite/PostgreSQL/MySQL).
For JSON: see graph.json (original graphify format, 76K lines).
